creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Dear FreeBSD committer:

I send a patch to update powerarchitect port from 0.9.11 to 0.9.12 version

# cd /usr/ports/databases/powerarchitect
# patch -p1 < pathToPatch.diff
# rm *.orig

Release notes:

http://download.sqlpower.ca/architect/0.9.12/doc/ReleaseNotes.txt

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
